CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-19-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sarge Holtzman, Esq. (415) 771-6174 for Defendant and Moving Party Hom
Paul Wartelle, Esq., Wartelle, Weaver 7 Schreiber (415) 693-0504 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Law
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court modified its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT DANIEL HOM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as to the First Cause of Action is SUSTAINED without leave to amend; as to the Second Cause of Action SUSTAINED with 20 days leave to amend to attempt to assert with particularity a claim pursuant to 7710 Corp. Code. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
